items.name: abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus
items.desc: GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration

items.desc: Deepseek to API: A lightweight, high-performance full-stack middleware converting client protocols to universal APIs. Supports multi-account rotation, compiled binaries, Vercel Serverless, and Docker. Compatible with Google, Claude, and OpenAI API formats.
